case_title: LORI MARKMAN ET AL VS. LARRY'S TOWING INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MARKMAN, LORI ZLOTNICK, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARKMAN, LORI ZLOTNICK, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-18-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LORI MARKMAN AND STEVEN ZLOTNICK. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD, CLERK S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
ORDER CONTINUED TO JANUARY 18, 2017 AT 1:30 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "IN DISPUTE-UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $ 90.00- SERVED DEC-20-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LORI MARKMAN IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STEVEN ZLOTNICK IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY RON CINTI, OWNER. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKMAN, LORI ZLOTNICK, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARRY'S TOWING INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,155.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
